footer.tagline: NTUTEC connects startup teams, corporate partners, and angel investors — 13 years cultivating NTU's most enduring campus entrepreneurship ecosystem.
footer.address:
7F, Excellence Research Building
NTU Shiyuan Campus
18 Siyuan St, Zhongzheng District, Taipei

meta.title: NTUTEC — NTU's Entrepreneurship Ecosystem Hub
meta.description: Over 600 startup teams mentored in 13 years. NTUTEC connects NTU innovation to global impact through the NTU Accelerator, NTU Garage, Corporate Vertical Accelerator, and Angels Club.

hero.label: NTU TAIDAH ENTREPRENEURSHIP CENTER · NTU's Entrepreneurship Ecosystem Hub
hero.title: NTUTEC
hero.subtitle: Bridging NTU Innovation to Global Impact
hero.description: From NTU to the world. Connecting industry. Reaching markets.

community.label: Community
community.title: 600+ Startups, Growing Together
community.description: At the 2026 Incubation Program Launch, over 80 founders and mentors gathered at NTU to begin a ten-month entrepreneurship acceleration journey.

connections.label: Three Connections
connections.title: What We Do — Three Connections
connections.description: Connecting NTU, industry, and capital. With 13 years of accumulated experience, we transform the best technologies and talents into investable startups.

ntu.label: Connect to NTU
ntu.title: NTU Connection
ntu.description: Bridging NTU's research energy and campus innovation units across all departments. No domain restrictions — transforming the best technologies and talents into investable startups.
ntu.proof: 600+ mentored teams (since 2013) · Open to all NTU departments

industry.label: Connect to Industry
industry.title: Industry Connection
industry.description: 35 corporate partnerships and counting. Pioneer of the Corporate Vertical Accelerator model — corporations define challenges, startups solve them. Partners include Nvidia, Synopsys, Foxconn, E.SUN Bank, and more.
industry.proof: 35 corporate partners · 27 batches of Corporate Vertical Accelerator

capital.label: Connect to Capital
capital.title: Capital Connection
capital.description: NTUTEC Angels Club provides members with curated deal flow, a rigorous three-stage due diligence process, and monthly investment meetings. All deals are thoroughly evaluated by investment managers, with access to 150+ investor network and VC connections.
capital.proof: Three-stage screening · Monthly meetings · 150+ investor network

meta.title: About NTUTEC | NTUTEC
meta.description: NTUTEC supports startups through the HI3 cultivation model (Incubation × Integration × Ignition). From NTU Garage in 2013 to 35 corporate partners and 27 batches of vertical accelerators — 13 years deepening NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem.

hero.title: About NTUTEC
hero.subtitle: About NTUTEC
hero.description: 13 Years · 600+ Startups · 35 Corporate Partners · 150+ Investor Network (including 40+ Angel Members) — the complete picture of NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.p1: NTUTEC is the operational hub of NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem. Our core mission — "Connecting NTU, Connecting Industry, Connecting Capital" — transforms NTU's best technological capabilities and talent into investable startups.
mission.p2: Over 13 years, we have cumulatively mentored over 600+ startup teams. Through the NTU Accelerator, NTU Garage, Corporate Vertical Accelerator (27 batches, 35 companies), and Angels Club (150+ investor network), we support startups from technical validation to market entry.
mission.p3: Our vision is to become Taiwan's most trusted campus-based startup accelerator — systematically supporting startups through the HI3 model (Incubation → Integration → Ignition), rooted in 13 years of university entrepreneurship development in Taiwan.

about.affiliation: National Taiwan University Innovation & Entrepreneurship Center — University-level unit under the Office of Research & Development

hi3.label: Our Approach
hi3.title: HI3 Cultivation Model
hi3.description: Human-centric approach — three-stage systematic support guiding startups from concept to market launch.

incubation.label: Incubation
incubation.title: Incubation
incubation.description: Through dedicated program managers, one-on-one mentor consultations, and professional workshops (business models, fundraising, legal), we accompany early-stage teams from idea to prototype validation.

integration.label: Integration
integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Connecting NTU's multi-disciplinary resources, corporate vertical accelerators, and EiMBA entrepreneurship programs — linking government initiatives (FITI, TTA) and international partners to help startups quickly engage with real-world environments.

ignition.label: Ignition
ignition.title: Ignition
ignition.description: Hosting Demo Day (74 investors attended, 2025), closed-door investment matching, and the Angels Club — igniting the first round of capital for ready teams and propelling them to market.

alumni.label: Alumni Impact
alumni.title: Alumni Success Stories
alumni.description: Starting from NTU Garage and Accelerator, these teams have completed fundraising, acquisitions, or international market validation.

packagePlus.detail: With National Development Fund and strategic investors on board, bringing circular packaging into Taiwan's mainstream e-commerce supply chain.

aistrom.detail: SelectUSA MedTech champion, with investment from NBA team-designated physicians and international orthopedic authorities.

botbonnie.detail: NTU alumni team successfully acquired by Appier, a Japanese publicly-listed AI company, achieving a complete exit.

2013.title: NTU Garage Launches
2013.description: Established NTU Garage at NTU Shiyuan Campus as a shared entrepreneurship space for students, building the foundation of NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem.

2014.title: NTUTEC Officially Established
2014.description: National Taiwan University officially established the Innovation & Entrepreneurship Center as a university-level unit, integrating campus entrepreneurship resources.

2016.title: NTU Challenge Campus Competition
2016.description: Co-hosted NTU Challenge with the College of Design, combining education, mentorship, and competition to discover campus entrepreneurship potential.

2017.title: NTU Accelerator Launches
2017.description: Launched the NTU Accelerator, providing growth-stage startup teams with market validation, business model iteration, and fundraising resources.

2019.title: Corporate Vertical Accelerator Pioneer
2019.description: Pioneered the Corporate Vertical Accelerator model, where corporations pose challenges and startups solve them — cumulatively partnering deeply with 35 companies including Foxconn, Nvidia, and Synopsys.

2020.title: Corporate Innovation Consulting
2020.description: Launched corporate open innovation consulting services, helping medium and large enterprises adopt startup thinking and agile innovation methodologies.

2022.title: Co-Creation Sandbox
2022.description: Launched the Co-Creation Sandbox membership program, providing startups with a safe product and market validation environment.

2026.title: Four Focus Areas & Three-University Alliance
2026.description: Focusing on AI software, biotech & healthcare, hard tech, and innovative business models — deepening the three-university entrepreneurship ecosystem alliance with NTNU and NTUST.

team.label: Our People
team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: Investment managers, program managers — every team member is a frontline partner for startups, not just giving advice, but walking through every critical milestone together.

meta.title: NTU Accelerator | NTUTEC
meta.description: NTUTEC's NTU Accelerator is a ten-month intensive program providing growth-stage startups with deep mentorship, corporate resource connections, and fundraising opportunities.

hero.title: NTU Accelerator
hero.subtitle: NTU Accelerator
hero.description: A ten-month intensive mentorship program helping growth-stage startups accelerate toward their next milestone. NTU affiliation not required — NTU-affiliated applicants receive priority. We value technological innovation and market potential.

overview.label: Overview
overview.title: Program Overview
overview.description: The NTU Accelerator, launched in 2017, is designed for growth-stage startups that have completed prototyping and entered market validation. The ten-month program offers one-on-one deep mentorship from 40+ active mentors in the 2026 cohort (backed by a database of 80+ mentors over the years), corporate partnership resources, the Angels Club, and VC network connections. The 2026 cohort is currently in progress (March–December).

phase1.title: Diagnosis & Positioning
phase1.description: Deep understanding of team's current situation, setting growth goals and milestones, and matching with the most suitable mentors.

phase2.title: Validation & Iteration
phase2.description: Focused on product-market fit validation, continuously optimizing the business model through customer interviews and data analysis.

phase3.title: Scaling Preparation
phase3.description: Building scalable operational frameworks, deepening corporate partnerships, and preparing fundraising materials.

phase4.title: Demo Day & Graduation
phase4.description: Pitching to angel investors and strategic partners, completing the program and securing ongoing support resources.

campusLife.label: Campus Life
campusLife.title: Program in Action
campusLife.description: Workshops, mentorship sessions, discussions — ten months of startup acceleration begins here.

mentors.title: Mentor Network
mentors.description: An extensive roster of 80+ mentors accumulated over the years, with 40+ active in 2026. Averaging over 20 years of industry experience covering venture capital, AI, biotech, semiconductors, and more — one-on-one deep mentorship.

corporate.title: Corporate Resources
corporate.description: 35 partner companies (including Nvidia, Synopsys, Foxconn, and others), providing technology validation environments and potential customer resources.

funding.title: Fundraising Connections
funding.description: Angels Club and 300+ investor network covering fundraising opportunities from seed to Series A rounds.

virtual.title: Virtual Residency
virtual.description: Free virtual residency at NTU Shiyuan Campus, with access to the center's meeting rooms and event spaces — flexible to fit your startup's pace.

criteria.label: Criteria
criteria.title: Application Requirements
items: NTU affiliation not required; applicants with NTU student, alumni, or faculty background receive priority
Completed MVP or prototype development with initial users or revenue
Team of at least 2 members, fully committed to the startup
Clear market opportunity and growth potential
Willing to commit to a ten-month systematic mentorship program
No industry restrictions, but must demonstrate technological or model innovation

batchSchedule.label: Batch Schedule
batchSchedule.title: Cohort Schedule
batchSchedule.description: The accelerator opens applications once per year on an annual cohort basis. The current cohort is in progress; the 2027 cohort applications are expected to open in December 2026.

current.title: 2026 Annual Cohort (In Progress)
current.detail: March – December 2026 · Annual cohort in progress; next batch applications open in December 2026

audience.description: Are you a corporation or investor? We have more suitable partnership options for you.

cta.title: Interested in the 2027 Cohort?
cta.description: Pre-register your team now, and we'll notify you as soon as official applications open in December. Pre-registration does not constitute an application — formal applications must still be submitted following the process.

meta.title: NTUTEC ANGELS | NTUTEC
meta.description: NTUTEC ANGELS: monthly curated deals from NTU's ecosystem, three-stage rigorous due diligence, named voting mechanism — join 40+ angel investors co-investing in early-stage startups. Individual membership NT$50,000/year.

hero.title: NTUTEC ANGELS
hero.subtitle: Angel Investment Club
hero.description: An angel investment community centered on NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem. Monthly curated quality deals, three-stage rigorous due diligence, named voting — co-invest with 40+ angel members (150+ investor network) in early-stage startups.

curated.title: Curated Quality Deals
curated.description: Every deal goes through three rigorous screening stages, personally due-diligenced by investment managers. Skip the time cost of self-screening and directly access quality startups that have passed high-threshold evaluation.

memo.title: Complete Investment Memos
memo.description: Every startup presented at monthly meetings comes with a complete DD memo: market analysis, financial models, competitive advantages, risk assessment, and Term Sheet recommendations to support your investment decisions.

flexible.title: Flexible Direct Investment
flexible.description: Members invest directly with personal funds, unconstrained by institutional co-investment restrictions. Investment amounts are self-determined with complete control over timing and scale.

ecosystem.title: Long-term Ecosystem Support
ecosystem.description: Connected to 13 years of accumulated mentor networks, alumni resources, and 35 corporate partners — portfolio companies receive not just capital, but sustained ecosystem momentum.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Monthly Process
howItWorks.description: From deal sourcing to investment decision — every step has a clear process.

dealflow.title: Deal Sourcing
dealflow.desc: Applications, mentor referrals, or alumni introductions

screening.title: Three-Stage Screening
screening.desc: Investment managers lead the full due diligence process

infoCard.title: Information Cards
infoCard.desc: Available before monthly meeting with complete investment summary

meeting.title: Angel Meeting
meeting.desc: Startup pitch and Q&A with real-time member interaction

voting.title: Named Voting
voting.desc: Members indicate interest in investing and explain their preferences

investment.title: Direct Investment
investment.desc: Members invest directly as individuals; center assists with documentation

screening.label: Screening Process
screening.title: Three-Stage Rigorous Screening
screening.description: Every deal presented at monthly meetings has undergone complete due diligence by investment managers — rigorous screening, never presented lightly.

gate1.title: Initial Screening (Hard Filter)
gate1.description: Basic qualification and domain fit screening — confirming deals align with focus areas (AI software, biotech & healthcare, hard tech, innovative business models).

gate2.title: Rapid Scoring
gate2.description: Multi-dimensional scoring on team, business model, market size, competitive advantages, execution capability — investment managers evaluate readiness for the next stage.

gate3.title: Full DD Report
gate3.description: Complete investment evaluation report including market analysis, financial models, and Term Sheet recommendations. Approved deals proceed to pitch at monthly meetings.

membership.label: Membership
membership.title: Membership Plans
membership.description: Annual fee structure, applications accepted at any time, subject to review.
membership.note: After submitting an application, the investment team will review your materials. Approved applicants will be scheduled for an interview to confirm mutual fit before formal membership.

individual.name: Individual Member
individual.subtitle: Angel Investor · Corporate Executive
benefits: Complete DD memos and due diligence materials
Monthly meeting attendance and named voting rights

corporate.name: Corporate Member
corporate.subtitle: CVC · VC · Financial Institutions · Corporate Groups

requirements.label: Requirements
requirements.title: Membership Eligibility
items: Interest in early-stage startup investment and willingness to invest time and resources
Alignment with NTUTEC's mission and values
Willingness to participate in monthly angel meetings and related activities
requirements.note: For payment details and further information, please see the application page or contact us directly.

angel.corporateCrossLink: Corporations may also participate in the early-stage investment ecosystem through the Corporate Vertical Accelerator program.

demoDay.label: Demo Day
demoDay.title: Annual Investment Matching Event
demoDay.description: Every December at NTU campus, selected startups pitch to investors. Angels Club members receive priority seats and post-investment tracking.

cta.title: Become a Member of the Angels Club
cta.description: Join NTU's entrepreneurship ecosystem angels and discover early-stage startups that will shape the future. Individual membership NT$50,000/year, corporate membership NT$100,000/year — applications accepted at any time, subject to review.
cta.disclaimer: Angel investing carries significant risks. The investment cases above represent historical performance and do not guarantee future investment results.

meta.description: Contact NTUTEC — address, phone, email, and office hours.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Contact
hero.description: For inquiries or partnership proposals, we welcome you to get in touch.
